standards.name: Presentation of Financial Statements
standards.description: Requires fair presentation, going concern assessment, accrual basis, materiality, and consistency.
standards.agent_rule: Flag any expense line item exceeding 5% of total revenue as material. Require disclosure note.

standards.name: Inventories
standards.description: Inventories measured at lower of cost and net realizable value. FIFO or weighted-average cost.
standards.agent_rule: If inventory value drops below 90% of purchase cost, raise impairment flag. Block auto-write-down.

standards.name: Property, Plant and Equipment
standards.description: Cost model or revaluation model. Depreciation over useful life.
standards.agent_rule: Verify depreciation rate against Schedule II of Companies Act 2013. Flag deviations > 2%.

standards.name: GST Input Tax Credit Reconciliation
standards.description: GSTR-2A vs purchase register reconciliation required monthly.
standards.agent_rule: Flag any ITC mismatch > ₹1,000. Auto-draft reconciliation note but require CA sign-off.

standards.name: TDS on Contractor Payments
standards.description: 1% (individual/HUF) or 2% (others) TDS on contractor payments exceeding ₹30,000 single / ₹1,00,000 aggregate per year.
standards.agent_rule: Auto-detect contractor payments. Flag if TDS not deducted on qualifying payments. Do not auto-file without human review.

standards.name: TDS on Professional Fees
standards.description: 10% TDS on professional/technical service fees exceeding ₹30,000 per year.
standards.agent_rule: Flag professional fee invoices missing TDS deduction. Compute correct TDS amount. Require human confirmation before journal entry.

standards.name: Provident Fund Compliance
standards.description: 12% employee + 12% employer contribution on Basic + DA. Monthly EPFO filing by 15th.
standards.agent_rule: Verify PF deduction on all employees with Basic > ₹15,000/month. Flag missing deductions. Never auto-remit.

standards.name: Audit Trail Requirement
standards.description: Companies Act 2013 + MCA circular: accounting software must maintain tamper-proof audit trail from FY 2023-24.
standards.agent_rule: All agent-proposed journal entries must be logged with timestamp, agent_id, and basis. Never delete audit logs.
